title: Teneo Appoints David Chissick as a Senior Advisor
snippet: Teneo, the global CEO advisory firm, today announced the appointment of David Chissick as a Senior Advisor. title: Teneo’s Kevin Kajiwara Discusses Tariffs and Iran on Bloomberg’s The Close
snippet: Kevin Kajiwara, Global Chair, Political Risk Advisory, joins Bloomberg’s The Close to discuss the effects of SCOTUS’ recent tariff ruling, along with the latest concerns coming out of Iran.

title: Teneo Appointed to Singapore Exchange “Value Unlock” Program Panel

title: Teneo’s Gabriel Wildau Discusses China’s Likely Response to Latest U.S. Tariffs with CNBC
snippet: Gabriel Wildau, Managing Director at Teneo, tells CNBC that China is not likely to directly respond to President Trump’s most recent round of tariff threats.

title: Teneo CEO Paul Keary Writes on Disruption for the Wall Street Journal

title: Speaker Paul Ryan Discusses Navigating Populism and Trade Uncertainty on Bloomberg Surveillance
snippet: Teneo Vice Chairman, Speaker Paul Ryan, appears on Bloomberg Surveillance with Jonathan Ferro and Lisa Abramowicz to discuss the forces shaping today’s economic and political landscape.

title: WestExec Advisors Cited as Leading Geopolitical Risk Consultants by The Times
snippet: The Times cited WestExec Advisors as a top geopolitical risk consultancy in their article describing the rising importance of risk consultants to global industry.

title: Bloomberg Covers Teneo’s Latest Acquisitions in New Zealand and The Nordics
snippet: Bloomberg publishes exclusive coverage of Teneo’s acquisition of PwC New Zealand’s Business Restructuring Services unit, as well as Teneo’s strategic majority investment in Clarity Partners in the Nordics.

title: Teneo’s Carsten Nickel Discusses the Fallout From the U.S. Intervention in Venezuela With CNBC
snippet: Carsten Nickel, Managing Director at Teneo, discusses the geopolitical implications to the U.S. intervention in Venezuela as well as the potential reaction from Russia and China.
